title: Silent minecarts
description: This resource pack changes all minecart sounds to silence
body:
## Description
This resource pack replaces all minecart sounds with silence.

## Why use this resource pack
Sometimes minecarts can be very loud, for example when riding them or when you use a certain design for item sorters that uses hopper minecarts. But sometimes you don't want to change the volume for friendly creatures at the same time.
This is where this resource pack comes into play! Just use this resource pack and your ears will be saved.
